prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: I found the experience of waking up to be quite mundane and unremarkable. There was a gradual increase in light and noise levels, followed by a sense of disorientation and grogginess that took some time to dissipate. The motion of opening my eyelids and sitting up was somewhat uninspiring, with no accompanying fanfare or special effects. Overall, I can't help but feel that the marketing for this experience has been vastly overhyped.
